creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
- shorten do-install target
- mark NO_WRKSUBDIR
- fix pkg-descr and COMMENT
- use more descriptive RESTRICTED from ports/148379
- use PORTDOCS from ports/148379
- use DOS2UNIX to remove ^M from .txt docs

--- a.diff begins here ---
Index: audio/linux-nerodigitalaudio/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /a/.cvsup/ports/audio/linux-nerodigitalaudio/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.2
diff -u -p -r1.2 Makefile
--- audio/linux-nerodigitalaudio/Makefile	26 Feb 2010 10:09:45 -0000	1.2
+++ audio/linux-nerodigitalaudio/Makefile	6 Jul 2010 06:43:44 -0000
@@ -1,44 +1,47 @@
-# New ports collection Makefile for:	linux-nerodigitalaudio
+# New ports collection Makefile for:	linux-neroaaccodec
 # Date created:				2007-10-27
 # Whom:					Yuichiro AIZAWA <yaizawa@2004.jukuin.keio.ac.jp>
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/audio/linux-nerodigitalaudio/Makefile,v 1.2 2010/02/26 10:09:45 miwi Exp $
 #
 
-PORTNAME=	nerodigitalaudio
-PORTVERSION=	1.1.34.2
+PORTNAME=	neroaaccodec
+PORTVERSION=	1.5.1
 CATEGORIES=	audio multimedia linux
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp6.nero.com/tools/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	linux-
-DISTNAME=	NeroDigitalAudio
+DISTNAME=	NeroAACCodec-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	yaizawa@2004.jukuin.keio.ac.jp
-COMMENT=	Nero Digital Audio Reference MPEG-4 & 3GPP Audio Encoder
+COMMENT=	Nero AAC reference quality MPEG-4 and 3GPP audio codec
 
 USE_ZIP=	yes
 USE_LINUX=	yes
+USE_DOS2UNIX=	yes
+DOS2UNIX_REGEX=	.*\.txt
 ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=	i386 amd64
 NO_BUILD=	yes
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}
-RESTRICTED=	forbidden by license considerations
+NO_WRKSUBDIR=	yes
+RESTRICTED=	Solely for personal non-commercial and/or technology-evaluation purposes. No reproduction and/or distribution permitted.
 
 PLIST_FILES=	bin/neroAacDec \
-		bin/neroAacEnc
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-PLIST_DIRS=	${DOCSDIR_REL}
-PLIST_FILES+=	${DOCSDIR_REL}/changelog.txt \
-		${DOCSDIR_REL}/license.txt \
-		${DOCSDIR_REL}/readme.txt
-.endif
+		bin/neroAacEnc \
+		bin/neroAacTag
+
+PORTDOCS=	NeroAAC_tut.pdf \
+		changelog.txt \
+		license.txt \
+		readme.txt
 
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/linux/neroAacDec ${PREFIX}/bin
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/linux/neroAacEnc ${PREFIX}/bin
+.for f in ${PLIST_FILES}
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/linux/${f:T} ${PREFIX}/bin
+.endfor
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
 	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/changelog.txt ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/license.txt ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/readme.txt ${DOCSDIR}
+.for f in ${PORTDOCS}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${f} ${DOCSDIR}
+.endfor
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

-SHA256 (NeroDigitalAudio.zip) = dc2978c9b501697fb8695192426181b3a128b249edc704ca879b6f51bad248af
-SIZE (NeroDigitalAudio.zip) = 2667124
+MD5 (NeroAACCodec-1.5.1.zip) = 150ead71fb7838c52a31098c85b91211
+SHA256 (NeroAACCodec-1.5.1.zip) = e0496ad856e2803001a59985368d21b22f4fbdd55589c7f313d6040cefff648b
+SIZE (NeroAACCodec-1.5.1.zip) = 2050564

+Nero AAC reference quality MPEG-4 and 3GPP audio codec
